steps.title: Check current argo-rollouts deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-rollouts version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
helm list -n argo-rollouts 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-rollouts installation.

steps.title: Review argo-rollouts configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts
```
In addition to the current controllers, it would be great to support Traefik!

The [TraefikService](https://docs.traefik.io/routing/providers/kubernetes-crd/#kind-traefikservice) object supports the ability for weighted round robin load balancing

steps.title: Apply the fix for Traefik Support
steps.description:
It seems that Traefik will have an implementation for the Kubernetes Gateway API https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/implementations/#traefik

So Traefik support might be available after implementing https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/issues/1438
```yaml
$ kubectl apply -f nginx-rollout.yaml -n argo-demo
error: error validating "nginx-rollout.yaml": error validating data: ValidationError(Rollout.spec.strategy.canary.trafficRouting): unknown field "traefik" in io.argoproj.v1alpha1.Rollout.spec.strategy.canary.trafficRouting; if you choose to ignore these errors, turn validation off with --validate=false
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts
kubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Traefik Support" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
It seems that Traefik will have an implementation for the Kubernetes Gateway API https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/implementations/#traefik

So Traefik support might be available after implementing https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/issues/1438
codeSnippets:
$ kubectl apply -f nginx-rollout.yaml -n argo-demo
error: error validating "nginx-rollout.yaml": error validating data: ValidationError(Rollout.spec.strategy.canary.trafficRouting): unknown field "traefik" in io.argoproj.v1alpha1.Rollout.spec.strategy.canary.trafficRouting; if you choose to ignore these errors, turn validation off with --validate=false

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-rollouts installed or the issue environment reproducible.
